blocks.text: Tuscan Gravel, Bay Hill, and Barcelona's Biggest Away Test

Saturday is loaded: Abrahamsen and Hoelgaard hunt glory on Strade Bianche's brutal white roads, Hovland stalks the Arnold Palmer leaderboard, and Barcelona walk into the San Mamés cauldron with La Liga title implications.
🚴 Strade Bianche 2026 — Abrahamsen and Hoelgaard race the iconic Tuscan gravel classics
⛳ Arnold Palmer Invitational — Hovland hunts Berger (-9) through the Bay Hill weekend rounds
